description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service. Define a single stage named build and a job called build that runs in this stage. The job should export IMAGE_TAG by converting $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME to a safe string with "export IMAGE_TAG=$(echo -en $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME | tr -c '[:alnum:]_.-' '-')", then log in to $CI_REGISTRY using "docker login -u \"gitlab-ci-token\" -p \"$CI_JOB_TOKEN\" $CI_REGISTRY", build the Docker image with "docker build --pull -t \"$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$IMAGE_TAG\" ." and finally push it with "docker push \"$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$IMAGE_TAG\"". The job runs on every commit without additional rules.
